✅ Experience: 0 – 1 Years (Freshers can apply)

✅ Duration: 3 Months Contract
✅ Training: No prior experience required – training will be provided 🎓

extracted.full_content:
Suhas Balang

Sr. Talent Acquisition Specialist at Sourcebae.

📢 Contract-Based Opportunity | 3 Open Roles | QA & Engineering
RL Gym Platform · AI/ML Domain

We're building out the quality and delivery layer for a Reinforcement Learning Gym platform and are looking for three sharp, experienced professionals on a contract basis. If you thrive in AI/ML environments and love owning quality end-to-end — read on.

─────────────────────────────
🔍 Senior QA Engineer
5+ years · Backend & Automation focus

Must have:
✅ Backend QA (APIs, services, data validation)
✅ Python + PyTest automation
✅ AI / ML project experience
✅ CI/CD & distributed systems

─────────────────────────────
🖥️ QA Lead — UI Environments
5+ years · Frontend & Workflow focus

Must have:
✅ UI / Frontend testing (manual + automated)
✅ Web app behavior & browser dev tools
✅ AI / ML project experience
✅ Playwright or similar automation tool

─────────────────────────────
📋 QA Engineering Manager
8+ years total · Cross-functional delivery ownership

Must have:
✅ 8+ years in QA / SDET / Software Engineering
✅ 2–3+ years in a managerial or lead role
✅ Python & Node.js (test frameworks, eval pipelines)
✅ Delivery planning, risk management, Jira/Asana

─────────────────────────────
🕐 8 hours availability required (including 4-hour overlap with PST)

DM me directly, drop a comment below with the role you're applying for, or share your profile at suhas@sourcebae.com
.
Feel free to share this with your network — let’s find the right people! 🙌

#QAEngineering #Hiring #ContractRole #AIMLJobs #ReinforcementLearning #RemoteWork #QALead #SoftwareTesting #OpenToWork
